_comment: Personal retrieval golden set (Gen 2 exit criterion). Seed set — grow toward 50 real cases as you use M.I.K.E.Y. Each case: query + `relevant` doc ids that should be retrieved ([] = negative, nothing should surface). The harness ingests `corpus` into a throwaway index and scores recall.

corpus.text: The Middle Man's Path: An Innovative Approach to Transportation Logistics. Authors: Shubh Parmar and Sheetal Gonsalves, NMIMS University Mumbai, presented at the 2025 IEEE ICSIT conference. The paper proposes a new method called The Middle Man's Path (MMP) for finding the initial solution to a transportation problem in operations research. MMP produces the same solution as VAM (Vogel's Approximation Method) while keeping steps as simple as the Northwest Corner Method. Existing initial-solution methods it compares against include NWCM, LCM, VAM, RM, CM, Heuristic Method 1, Heuristic Method 2, and RAM. The aim is cost-efficiency in supply chain management and moving goods from source to destination.
M.I.K.E.Y runs cloud inference on Groq using the llama-3.3-70b-versatile model, with a local Ollama llama3.2 model as an offline fallback selected by the Model Gateway when Groq is rate-limited.

M.I.K.E.Y follows a ten-generation roadmap. Generation 1 is the trustworthy core with an event log, policy engine, and sandboxed executor. Generation 2 is memory that deserves the name, adding ingestion, provenance, and verified forgetting. Generation 10, the JARVIS threshold, is bounded autonomy where standing delegations run within earned policy envelopes.

Classic chocolate lava cake recipe: melt butter with dark chocolate, whisk in eggs and sugar, fold in flour, pour into ramekins, and bake in a hot oven for twelve minutes until the edges set while the center stays molten.

cases.query: who is the main author of the middle man's path paper
which method gives the same solution as the middle man's path
optimizing the transportation problem in operations research
methods for finding the initial solution of a transportation problem
which conference was the middle man's path presented at
what cloud model does mikey use for inference
what is the offline fallback model
what is generation 1 the trustworthy core
which generation is the jarvis threshold bounded autonomy
chocolate lava cake baking recipe ramekins
